title: Create:Tuff (port)
description: simple Create: Tuff port from forge 1.20.1 for the neoforge version 1.21.1
body:
Create:Tuff NeoForge 1.21.1 port

original version: https://modrinth.com/mod/createtuff

This mod adds a 3 step recipe for tuff and one for more ore gain!

Featuring two new items: Volcanic Ash and Diamond Shard

For more information on the process check the Gallery or JEI for all the process!
